## Styling
- Use the same code styling as in the repository.
- No code cleanup or automatic reformatting of existing code.

## Pull requests
- One feature per pull request.
- Isolate the feature as much as possible to prevent merging conflicts. Prevent to touch other code as much as possible.

### Language files
- One language file per pull request.
- The file must be formatted like 'xx-YY.json'.
- Location for language files: https://github.com/justEli/Coins/tree/master/locale
